title: Login page not loading
description: Users are unable to access the login page on mobile devices.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Checkout process fails when customers try to pay with cards.

title: Profile image upload issue
description: Uploading profile pictures returns an unsupported format error.

title: Dashboard data mismatch
description: Sales reports are showing incorrect totals on the admin dashboard.

title: Email notifications delayed
description: System emails are arriving several hours late.

title: Search feature not returning results
description: Product search returns empty results even for valid keywords.

title: Broken image links
description: Several product images are not displaying on the homepage.

title: App crashes on startup
description: Android application crashes immediately after opening.

title: Password reset email missing
description: Users are not receiving password reset instructions.

title: Slow page performance
description: Website pages take more than 10 seconds to load.

title: Invoice PDF download failed
description: Customers cannot download invoice PDFs after purchase.

title: Two-factor authentication issue
description: Verification codes are not being accepted during login.
